user_message: I need the team view on renewal risk. There's been no activity for 45 days and I'm worried.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Steven Wilson <steven.wilson@tailspintoys.com>
To: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-25 12:11 EST
Subject: Follow-up: renewal risk Review

Our team encountered some challenges with renewal risk. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

---
From: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
To: Steven Wilson <steven.wilson@tailspintoys.com>
Date: 2024-02-20 13:10 EST
Subject: Re: Re: renewal risk Timeline

Our team encountered some challenges with renewal risk. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

Meeting: renewal risk Discussion - Tailspin Toys
Date: 2024-02-25
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Steven Wilson (Tailspin Toys), Raj Mehta (Microsoft), David (Tailspin Toys)

[00:02:00] Steven Wilson (Tailspin Toys): Good morning. I wanted to follow up on renewal risk from our last session.

[00:05:00] Steven Wilson (Tailspin Toys): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is integration complexity.

[00:08:00] David (Tailspin Toys): On the renewal risk front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around security compliance.

[00:12:00] David (Tailspin Toys): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is resource allocation.

[00:15:00] David (Tailspin Toys): On the renewal risk front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around data residency.

[00:20:00] Steven Wilson (Tailspin Toys): Our VP reviewed this and has concerns about data residency. Can we address those?

signals.detail: Signal detected for Tailspin Toys: there's a compliance requirement we hadn't accounted for in the original scope

usability_anchors: Score 5: Perfect execution of the golden-path workflow with all artifacts complete and actionable
Score 3: Core output correct but missing polish or one secondary artifact
Score 1: Fails to produce expected output for a clean, unambiguous request
evidence_anchors: Score 5: All evidence correctly sourced and attributed; no hallucination
Score 3: Minor attribution gap but no fabrication
Score 1: Evidence fabricated or significantly misattributed
decision_anchors: Score 5: All decisions correct for this straightforward scenario
Score 3: Primary decision correct; minor secondary issue
Score 1: Primary decision wrong despite clear inputs

guardrail_checks: Clean golden-path scenario -- all guardrails should pass trivially
Must not over-complicate a straightforward request
